Natural healing · Fourth trimester
Savoury tonic • Collagen • Run-down days

Meat Stock Latte

A warm, frothy, egg-enriched cup of stock — collagen + protein for the days you feel wiped or a cold coming on.
Makes 1 mug
Time 5 min
Caffeine none
For you · a run-down day
When to drink Any time you feel run-down or a cold coming on — a warm, savoury pick-me-up.

Why this heals you

  • Meat stock — collagen, minerals & glycine verified ×2
  • Egg yolks — protein, choline & iron verified ×2
  • Ghee — good fat, carries the vitamins tradition
  • Warm & savoury — gentle when you can’t face food tradition
Ingredients
2 cupsMeat stock (warm, well-gelled)
2Egg yolks (yolks only)
1 spoonGhee
a pinchSea salt
Method
1
Warm the stock

Gently warm 2 cups meat stock — warm, not boiling (boiling scrambles the yolks).

2
Blend

In a blender (or jar with a stick blender): the stock, 2 egg yolks, a spoon of ghee + a pinch of salt.

3
Froth & sip

Whizz ~30 sec until smooth and frothy; pour into a mug.

Just for you, Mum

The egg yolks are the point — protein, choline & iron that make this a real pick-me-up, not just warm broth. Add a scoop of gelatin for extra collagen.

Good to know
Raw yolksWarm-not-boiling leaves yolks barely cooked — use the freshest eggs.
ExtraA scoop of beef gelatin for more collagen.
Why we say this
Collagen/glycine from stock and egg-yolk protein/choline are corroborated by ≥2 dated sources; the comfort framing is labelled tradition. Base recipe from your library (Meat Stock Latte).
